name: Break-Even Point Calculator
description: Industrial-grade break-even analysis tool compliant with ISO 9001, Lean, and Six Sigma standards. Calculates the minimum production volume required to cover all costs, incorporating fixed costs, variable costs, revenue, and quality-related losses.

inputs.label: Total Fixed Costs (per period)
inputs.businessContext: Sum of all fixed costs (rent, salaries, insurance, depreciation) for the period. ISO 9001:2015 clause 7.1.4.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sum of all fixed costs (rent, salaries, insurance, depreciation) for the period. ISO 9001:2015 clause 7.1.4.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönem için tüm sabit maliyetlerin toplamı (kira, maaşlar, sigorta, amortisman). ISO 9001:2015 madde 7.1.4.

inputs.label: Variable Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct material, direct labor, and variable overhead per unit. Lean manufacturing standard cost approach.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct material, direct labor, and variable overhead per unit. Lean manufacturing standard cost approach.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birim başına direkt malzeme, direkt işçilik ve değişken genel gider. Yalın üretim standart maliyet yaklaşımı.

inputs.label: Selling Price per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Net selling price after discounts and returns. WERC DC Metrics benchmark.

businessContext_i18n.en: Net selling price after discounts and returns. WERC DC Metrics benchmark.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İndirimler ve iadeler sonrası net satış fiyatı. WERC DC Metrikleri kıyaslaması.

inputs.label: Defect Rate (ppm)
inputs.businessContext: Parts per million defective. Six Sigma DMAIC metric. Typical baseline 5000 ppm (3.8 sigma).

businessContext_i18n.en: Parts per million defective. Six Sigma DMAIC metric. Typical baseline 5000 ppm (3.8 sigma).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Milyonda hatalı parça sayısı. Altı Sigma DMAIC metriği. Tipik taban değer 5000 ppm (3,8 sigma).

inputs.label: Rework Cost per Defective Unit
inputs.businessContext: Cost to rework or scrap a defective unit. Includes labor, material, and overhead.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost to rework or scrap a defective unit. Includes labor, material, and overhead.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hatalı bir birimi yeniden işleme veya hurdaya ayırma maliyeti. İşçilik, malzeme ve genel giderleri içerir.

inputs.label: Actual Production Volume (units)
inputs.businessContext: Total units produced in the period. Used for actual vs. break-even comparison.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total units produced in the period. Used for actual vs. break-even comparison.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönemde üretilen toplam birim sayısı. Gerçek ve başabaş karşılaştırması için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Cost Allocation Method
inputs.businessContext: Traditional uses single overhead rate; activity-based uses multiple cost drivers. ABC is recommended for ISO 9001:2015 clause 9.1.3.

businessContext_i18n.en: Traditional uses single overhead rate; activity-based uses multiple cost drivers. ABC is recommended for ISO 9001:2015 clause 9.1.3.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geleneksel yöntem tek bir genel gider oranı kullanır; faaliyet tabanlı yöntem birden çok maliyet sürücüsü kullanır. ISO 9001:2015 madde 9.1.3 için ABC önerilir.

rules.message: Selling price must be greater than variable cost per unit to achieve break-even.
Fixed costs must be greater than zero.
Defect rate must be between 0 and 1,000,000 ppm.

thresholds.message: Contribution margin ratio is below 20%. High risk of loss if volume drops.
Defect rate exceeds 50,000 ppm (3.8 sigma). Quality losses significantly impact break-even.
Actual production volume is below break-even point. Operation is running at a loss.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
